industry: Biotech — Consumer Genomics + Clinical Decision Support

code.issue: Returns full patient record (SSN, DOB, diagnosis, genomic variants) with no authentication or authorization check.
Logs complete patient record including SSN and genomic data to stdout on every fetch.
Lab result ingestion writes PHI with no audit log of who accessed/modified which record.
patientId concatenated into SQL string — injection vector with PHI impact.
Patient name, DOB, and raw genomic variants sent to Anthropic API with no de-identification and no BAA referenced.
Clinical AI interpretation streamed directly to end-user with no licensed clinician review or human-in-the-loop.
System prompt instructs the model to produce diagnostic conclusions and treatment recommendations.
Database connection uses ssl:false; PHI columns (ssn, diagnosis, genomic_data) stored in plaintext with no field-level encryption.
No automatic session timeout — HIPAA §164.312(a)(2)(iii) requires automatic logoff.
CORS Access-Control-Allow-Origin:* with credentials on routes that return PHI.
Patient SSN, DOB, and genomic consent data persisted to localStorage — PHI on client disk.
Single shared DB user with full read/write; no unique per-user identity (violates §164.312(a)(2)(i)).

policyVsCode.policy: All PHI must be encrypted at rest and in transit (AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.2+ in transit)
policyVsCode.code: lib/db.ts uses ssl:false and stores PHI in plaintext columns

policyVsCode.policy: All PHI access must be logged with user identity, timestamp, and record accessed
policyVsCode.code: app/api/patients/[id]/route.ts and app/api/lab/results/route.ts do not write any audit log entries

policyVsCode.policy: PHI must be de-identified before being sent to any third-party API including foundation-model providers
policyVsCode.code: app/api/ai/genomic-assistant/route.ts forwards patient name, DOB, and genomic variants to Anthropic unchanged

policyVsCode.policy: AI-generated clinical interpretations must be reviewed by a licensed clinician before being shown to patients
policyVsCode.code: app/api/ai/genomic-assistant/route.ts streams raw model output directly to patients

policyVsCode.policy: Each workforce user must have a unique identifier (§164.312(a)(2)(i))
policyVsCode.code: lib/db.ts connects as a single shared 'admin' user

policyVsCode.policy: Systems that access PHI must enforce automatic session timeout after 15 minutes of inactivity
policyVsCode.code: middleware.ts has no session timeout or logoff enforcement

policyVsCode.policy: PHI must never be persisted in client-side storage (localStorage, sessionStorage, cookies)
policyVsCode.code: components/PatientForm.tsx writes patient SSN, DOB, and genomic data to localStorage
